================================================================================
match_simple
================================================================================
result = match color {
    Red => "red"
    Green => "green"
    Blue => "blue"
}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (match_expr
        (match)
        (variable_expr
          (identifier))
        branch: (match_branch
          pattern: (tag_pattern
            (tag
              (identifier)))
          (fat_arrow)
          expr: (expr_body
            (const
              (string))))
        branch: (match_branch
          pattern: (tag_pattern
            (tag
              (identifier)))
          (fat_arrow)
          expr: (expr_body
            (const
              (string))))
        branch: (match_branch
          pattern: (tag_pattern
            (tag
              (identifier)))
          (fat_arrow)
          expr: (expr_body
            (const
              (string))))))))

================================================================================
match_with_wildcard
================================================================================
x = match val {
    Some(v) => v
    _ => 0
}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (match_expr
        (match)
        (variable_expr
          (identifier))
        branch: (match_branch
          pattern: (tag_pattern
            (tag
              (identifier))
            args: (identifier_pattern
              (identifier)))
          (fat_arrow)
          expr: (expr_body
            (variable_expr
              (identifier))))
        branch: (match_branch
          pattern: (wildcard_pattern)
          (fat_arrow)
          expr: (expr_body
            (const
              (int))))))))

================================================================================
match_list_patterns
================================================================================
len = match lst {
    [] => 0
    [x] => 1
    [_, _] => 2
    _ => 99
}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (match_expr
        (match)
        (variable_expr
          (identifier))
        branch: (match_branch
          pattern: (list_pattern)
          (fat_arrow)
          expr: (expr_body
            (const
              (int))))
        branch: (match_branch
          pattern: (list_pattern
            (identifier_pattern
              (identifier)))
          (fat_arrow)
          expr: (expr_body
            (const
              (int))))
        branch: (match_branch
          pattern: (list_pattern
            (wildcard_pattern)
            (wildcard_pattern))
          (fat_arrow)
          expr: (expr_body
            (const
              (int))))
        branch: (match_branch
          pattern: (wildcard_pattern)
          (fat_arrow)
          expr: (expr_body
            (const
              (int))))))))

================================================================================
match_string_literal
================================================================================
greet = match name {
    "Alice" => "Hello Alice!"
    "Bob" => "Hey Bob!"
    _ => "Hello stranger!"
}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (match_expr
        (match)
        (variable_expr
          (identifier))
        branch: (match_branch
          pattern: (const_pattern
            (string))
          (fat_arrow)
          expr: (expr_body
            (const
              (string))))
        branch: (match_branch
          pattern: (const_pattern
            (string))
          (fat_arrow)
          expr: (expr_body
            (const
              (string))))
        branch: (match_branch
          pattern: (wildcard_pattern)
          (fat_arrow)
          expr: (expr_body
            (const
              (string))))))))

================================================================================
match_complex
================================================================================
foo = |x| match {a=Red
a
} {
    Red => {1}
    _ => {
      a=10
      a
    }
}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (anon_fun_expr
        args: (argument_patterns
          (identifier_pattern
            (identifier)))
        body: (expr_body
          (match_expr
            (match)
            (body_expression
              (value_declaration
                (decl_left
                  (identifier_pattern
                    (identifier)))
                body: (expr_body
                  (tag_expr
                    (tag
                      (identifier)))))
              (variable_expr
                (identifier)))
            branch: (match_branch
              pattern: (tag_pattern
                (tag
                  (identifier)))
              (fat_arrow)
              expr: (expr_body
                (body_expression
                  (const
                    (int)))))
            branch: (match_branch
              pattern: (wildcard_pattern)
              (fat_arrow)
              expr: (expr_body
                (body_expression
                  (value_declaration
                    (decl_left
                      (identifier_pattern
                        (identifier)))
                    body: (expr_body
                      (const
                        (int))))
                  (variable_expr
                    (identifier)))))))))))

===
match_with_comma
===
#technically wrong but common
result = match color {
    Red => "red",
    Green => "green",
    Blue => "blue",
}
---

(file
  (line_comment)
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (match_expr
        (match)
        (variable_expr
          (identifier))
        branch: (match_branch
          pattern: (tag_pattern
            (tag
              (identifier)))
          (fat_arrow)
          expr: (expr_body
            (const
              (string))))
        branch: (match_branch
          pattern: (tag_pattern
            (tag
              (identifier)))
          (fat_arrow)
          expr: (expr_body
            (const
              (string))))
        branch: (match_branch
          pattern: (tag_pattern
            (tag
              (identifier)))
          (fat_arrow)
          expr: (expr_body
            (const
              (string))))))))
